name: @meshkore/architect
description: MeshKore architect cockpit — Solid.js SPA. Talks to the local meshcore daemon over HTTP+WS.

scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name meshkore-portal --branch preview-solid --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name meshkore-portal --branch main --commit-dirty=true
